name: Katrina
answer1:
Magincia was
destroyed by its
pride.
answer2:
Pride flourishes
in the absence
of truth, love
and courage.
question: Art thou proud?
no:
Humility is the
virtue that
must overcome
pride!

name: Ghostly
answer1:
Peace I can
never find,
forever banished
unto the realm
of earthbound
spirits.
answer2:
Be not proud of
thy little deeds
lest ye too fall
from the light!
question: A

name: Skullface
job:
I am a nobleman
of great birth.
answer1:
Me and my
brother are the
last two of the
great Meridid
family.
question:
Thou hast heard
of us of course,
yes?
no:
You must not be
from near these
parts!

name: Casperin
answer1:
A lot of
haunting goes on
round here.
answer2:
Seek ye the
mantra for
humility, ask ye
Heywood!
question: Know thee why?
yes:
Pride is the
surest measure
of goals never
attained!

name: Faultless
answer1:
I was hung for
my sin of pride!
answer2:
The mantra for
pride, being
the antithesis
of humility,
is 'MUL'.
question: Art thou proud?

name: Heywood
health:
As well as can
be expected.
answer1:
Pride goeth
before, shame
cometh after!
answer2:
Faultless knows
the mantra of
pride ask him!
question: Art thou proud?
no:
A proud soul
surely knows not
its worth!

name: Slim
health:
A bit on the
thin side.
answer1:
I did value
myself far too
greatly, that
pride was my
downfall.
question:
Art thou
always humble?
no:
Take no pride in
humility, lest
ye destroy it!

name: Banter
job:
I once held the
silver horn.
answer1:
The silver horn
must be used to
pass the daemon
guard of the
shrine.
answer2:
Wierdrum has
been to the
shrine of
humility!
question:
Seek ye
the horn?

name: Demitry
answer1:
Bones, them
bones, them
dry bones...
answer2:
The queen of
love has a lady
in waiting, she
can tell thee
more of the
horn!
question: Art thou dead?

name: Wierdrum
job:
I haunt,
and I haunt,
and I haunt!
answer1:
A haunting job
takes more than
a lifetime, it
takes forever!
answer2:
Yes, I have been
to the shrine,
it lies on the
north bank in
the isle of the
abyss!
question: A

name: Boozer
job:
I was once
a powerful
merchant!
answer1:
My wealth
was boundless,
I held great
power!
answer2:
A proud soul
surely knows not
it's worth!
question: Dost thou see?
yes:
The world goes
on without me.
no:
The world goes
on without me.

name: Bulbous
answer1:
Why, the food
shop of course.
answer2:
Well, we're
expecting more
any day!
question:
Can I interest
thee in some
rations?
yes:
Hmmm, our stock
seems to have
spoiled....
no:
I sell only the
very best.

name: Splot
answer1:
I was proud,
strip thyself of
conceits, only
the humble are
pure!
answer2:
The root from
which all
virtues grow!
question:
Dost thou
seek purity?
yes:
Then ask the
snake of the
rune and stone!

name: Ruskin
job:
I now try to
understand
humility.
answer1:
The first test
of a great soul
is humility!
answer2:
Ask the snake of
the rune, just
before it
strikes!
question:
Dost thou seek
to know
humility?

name: Nate
job:
I bring death
to all life in
Magincia!
answer1:
Those who seek
the black stone
need ask at the
pub in Britain!
answer2:
The sacred rune
of humility was
banished from
this city. Ask
Barren in Paws!
question: A

name: Virtuebane
job:
I welcome thee
to Magincia!
Proud city of
the high seas!
answer1:
Magincia fell
unto the realm
of darkness for
the foundation
of their virtue
was ill-placed
in pride!
question: Art thou proud?
